/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -fPIC  -O3 -march=native -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-label  -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/graupel_run.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libgraupel_run.so -o libgraupel_run.so CMakeFiles/graupel_run.dir/home/vogtha/git/icon4py/.gt4py_cache_1/.gt4py_cache/graupel_run_311ec975328fc2a0be2d6b412a37295c9e51fddf48c36ff202b41850ea738dfe/src/cpu/graupel_run.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graupel_run.dir/home/vogtha/git/icon4py/.gt4py_cache_1/.gt4py_cache/graupel_run_311ec975328fc2a0be2d6b412a37295c9e51fddf48c36ff202b41850ea738dfe/src/cuda/graupel_run_cuda.cu.o CMakeFiles/graupel_run.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
